zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes von Saffenberg於1158年出生在德國海因里希_海普洛文次可布倫賽時，她的父親Hermann II. von Saffenberg48歲，母親Agnes von Müllenark24歲。她於大約1179年與Heinrich II. von Sayn在德國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1201年5月27日在德國沃爾可斯塔阿特 賀瑟可萊斯 本海姆藍培特海姆史洛斯享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes von Saffenberg于1158年出生在德国海因里希_海普洛文次可布倫賽时，她的父亲Hermann II. von Saffenberg48岁，母亲Agnes von Müllenark24岁。她于大约1179年与Heinrich II. von Sayn在德国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1201年5月27日在德国沃爾可斯塔阿特 賀瑟可萊斯 本海姆藍培特海姆史洛斯享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes von Saffenberg was born in 1158, in Sayn, Coblenz, Rhineland, Prussia, Germany, her father, Hermann II. von Saffenberg, was 48 and her mother, Agnes von Müllenark, was 24. She married Heinrich II. von Sayn about 1179, in Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 27 May 1201, in Neuschloß, Lampertheim, Bensheim, People's State of Hesse, Germany, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes von Saffenberg est née en 1158, à Sayn, Coblenz, Rhénanie, Prusse, Allemagne, son père, Hermann II. von Saffenberg, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Agnes von Müllenark, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Heinrich II. von Sayn environ 1179, à Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 27 mai 1201, à Neuschloß, Lampertheim, Kreis Bensheim, Volksstaat Hessen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 43 ans.

Sie hat um 1179 in Deutschland Heinrich II. von Sayn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 27. Mai 1201 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Neuschloß, Lampertheim, Kreis Bensheim, Volksstaat Hessen, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes von Saffenberg è nata il nel 1158 nel Sayn, Coblenz, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Germania, sua padre, Hermann II. von Saffenberg, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Agnes von Müllenark, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Heinrich II. von Sayn circa 1179, nel Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. ko.lifeSummary: Agnes von Saffenberg(이)가 1158년 독일 플레우ss 리인플로빈츠 컵렌즈 지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hermann II. von Saffenberg(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes von Müllenark(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1179년 독일에서 Heinrich II. von Sayn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1201년 5월 27일 독일 볼크스타앳 헤센 크레이스 벤셰임 램퍼테임 니우슐로ss에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes von Saffenberg nasceu em 1158, em Sayn, Coblenz, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Alemanha, seu pai, Hermann II. von Saffenberg, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Agnes von Müllenark, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Heinrich II. von Sayn aproximadamente 1179, em Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 27 de maio de 1201, em Neuschloß, Lampertheim, Kreis Bensheim, Volksstaat Hessen, Alemanha, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes von Saffenberg родилась в 1158 г. в местности сеин, кобленц, раинпровинз, Пруссия, Германия, её отцу по имени Hermann II. von Saffenberg было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes von Müllenark, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Heinrich II. von Sayn около 1179 г. в местности Германия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 27 мая 1201 г. в местности неущлоss, лэмпиртим, крис беншим, фолксстаат хессен, Германия в возрасте 43 лет.

Se casó con Heinrich II. von Sayn aproximadamente 1179, en Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas.
